description: Machine-readable pattern library encoding proven patterns from 17 production skills. Used by meta-skills and the skill factory to generate higher-quality first drafts.

patterns.applies_when: skill needs to extract content under markdown H2 headings
patterns.anti_pattern: ##? matches H1 document titles — NEVER use ##?

patterns.applies_when: subsections have **Label:** value attributes that could be mistaken for subsection names
skill has a depth or length parameter that affects output size
always — critic step produces quality score
patterns.anti_pattern: weighted average lets structural failures pass

patterns.rule: acceptance_score AND transition right: must equal min_quality_score in contracts (currently 7)
patterns.applies_when: always — every skill with a critic loop
patterns.anti_pattern: threshold > realistic min() score → step_4 always runs → destroys good output

patterns.applies_when: customer-facing content with call-to-action

patterns.markers: numbers, time references, outcome words, curiosity markers
patterns.applies_when: content has headlines that should contain benefits not labels
marketing/persuasive content
product descriptions, landing pages, sales content
skill supports multiple output formats with different structure requirements

patterns.detection: 13 regex patterns extracting $, %, counts from input
patterns.validation: all input tokens must survive in output
patterns.applies_when: skill transforms text that contains numbers/stats
professional/marketing content

patterns.detection: precise stats without input data, fabricated testimonials, citation fabrication
patterns.applies_when: skill produces claims that should be grounded in input
recommendations or action items need to be actionable
LLM output uses structured labels that need deterministic extraction
patterns.anti_pattern: free-floating keyword detection matches regular English

patterns.applies_when: content classifies items by both maturity and timeline

patterns.detection: 2+ capitalized terms or combination patterns (X + Y, X combined with Y)
patterns.applies_when: content analyzes interactions between multiple entities

patterns.method: word overlap at heading level, 60% = known
patterns.threshold: 30%+ must be new, or explicit coverage acknowledgment
patterns.applies_when: user provides known items and expects the output to go beyond them

patterns.required: maturity label + industry term + specific technique
patterns.applies_when: trend or technology descriptions need substance not marketing fluff

patterns.method: compare formality markers in opening vs closing against brand_voice
patterns.applies_when: content has brand voice requirements

patterns.rule: condition word AND measurable element required
patterns.applies_when: requirements documents with acceptance criteria

patterns.paths: 2+ numeric tokens OR derivation chain OR explicit insufficient-data acknowledgment
patterns.applies_when: pricing or revenue claims

patterns.paths: numeric sizing, qualitative scoping, or data gap acknowledgment
patterns.applies_when: market analysis with sizing

patterns.rule: each step in a guide has a verification checkpoint
patterns.applies_when: setup guides, tutorials, instructional content
operational runbooks, troubleshooting guides

patterns.rule: recovery must have rollback or explicit no-rollback justification
patterns.applies_when: operational procedures with risk of failure
skill has scope/depth parameter affecting output volume
